def solve(weight)
    n = weight.length
    pge = Array.new(n, -1)
    stack = []
    for i in 0...n
        while stack.any? && weight[stack[-1]] <= weight[i]
            stack.pop
        end
        if stack.any?
            pge[i] = stack[-1]
        else
            pge[i] = -1
        end
        stack << i
    end

    start = 0
    count = 0
    for i in 0...n
        if pge[i] != -1 && pge[i] >= start
            count += 1
            start = i + 1
        end
    end
    count
end

def solve(weight)

    stack = []

end

def solve(weight)
    n = weight.length
    pge = Array.new(n, -1)
    stack = []
    for i in 0...n
        while stack.any? && weight[stack[-1]] <= weight[i]
            stack.pop
        end
        if stack.any?
            pge[i] = stack[-1]
        else
            pge[i] = -1
        end
        stack << i
    end

    start = 0
    count = 0
    for i in 0...n
        if pge[i] != -1 && pge[i] >= start
            count += 1
            start = i + 1
        end
    end
    count
end
